prompt: generate an image of single frame of black grapes, close to 40 in a bunch, with 34 of them in normal grape size, 4 of them with a size of five times larger, 2 of them 10 times smaller, hands plucking out these larger and smaller grapes. the background could be a grape farm, but need not be very clear, the size difference between the normal, smaller and bigger should be clearly visible.
concept: the name of the concept you chose — Outlier detection
metaphor: Grape bunch with grapes much larger/smaller than rest, hands plucking out larger/smaller grapes to eliminate the outliers before they go to market
